title: Dimension Capital's $800M third fund shows the intersection of science and compute is booming | TechCrunch
summary: On Tuesday, the New York firm — which invests at the intersection of science and compute — announced an $800 million fund, which is 60% larger than its $500 million second vehicle announced just 18 months ago.
